  "concepts": [
    { "id": "c_official_statistics", "name": "official statistics", "aliases": ["official data and statistics"], "description": "Authoritative statistics produced by national statistical systems, whose continuing relevance the document treats as a public good.", "grounding_span": "the role of official statistics is essential", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_ai_readiness", "name": "AI-readiness of official data and statistics", "aliases": ["AI-readiness", "data for AI"], "description": "The state in which official data and metadata can be correctly and contextually consumed by AI, spanning quality, discoverability, accessibility, semantic interoperability, and platform architecture.", "grounding_span": "The objective of AI -readiness of official data and statistics", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_ai", "name": "artificial intelligence (AI)", "aliases": ["AI", "artificial intelligence"], "description": "Technology becoming embedded in data analysis, policymaking, information access and service delivery that can read, consume, process, and use official data and statistics.", "grounding_span": "As artificial intelligence (AI) becomes increasingly embedded in data analysis", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_ai_consumption", "name": "AI consumption", "aliases": [], "description": "The reading and use of official data and statistics by AI, for which readiness is described as a growing priority.", "grounding_span": "the readiness of official data and statistics for AI consumption is a growing priority", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_data_metadata_quality", "name": "data and metadata quality", "aliases": [], "description": "A foundational component of AI-readiness concerning the correctness of data and metadata.", "grounding_span": "data and metadata quality", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_discoverability", "name": "discoverability", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of AI-readiness concerning the ability to find official data and statistics.", "grounding_span": "discoverability, accessibility", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_accessibility", "name": "accessibility", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of AI-readiness concerning the ability to access official data and statistics.", "grounding_span": "accessibility, semantic interoperability", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_semantic_interoperability", "name": "semantic interoperability", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of AI-readiness concerning shared meaning across systems.", "grounding_span": "semantic interoperability, and platform architecture", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_platform_architecture", "name": "platform architecture", "aliases": [], "description": "A component of AI-readiness concerning the platform structures across the data and statistical business process.", "grounding_span": "semantic interoperability, and platform architecture across the entire data and statistical business process", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_business_process", "name": "data and statistical business process", "aliases": [], "description": "The full end-to-end process across which AI-readiness must hold, including dissemination and governance.", "grounding_span": "across the entire data and statistical business process", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_dissemination", "name": "dissemination", "aliases": [], "description": "A stage of the data and statistical business process encompassed by AI-readiness.", "grounding_span": "including dissemination and governance", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_governance", "name": "governance", "aliases": [], "description": "A stage of the data and statistical business process encompassed by AI-readiness.", "grounding_span": "including dissemination and governance", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_machine_readable", "name": "machine-readable", "aliases": ["machine-readability"], "description": "A foundational technical property required to make data and statistics AI-ready.", "grounding_span": "making them machine-readable, and fully interoperable", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_interoperability", "name": "interoperability", "aliases": ["fully interoperable"], "description": "A foundational technical property required to make data and statistics AI-ready.", "grounding_span": "and fully interoperable", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_nsos", "name": "National Statistical Offices (NSOs)", "aliases": ["NSOs"], "description": "National statistical offices that must adopt an active stewardship role over the AI ecosystem in addition to technical readiness.", "grounding_span": "NSOs must also take an active stewardship role over the AI ecosystem itself", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_stewardship", "name": "stewardship role", "aliases": ["active stewardship role"], "description": "An active role NSOs must take over the AI ecosystem, beyond foundational technical steps.", "grounding_span": "an active stewardship role over the AI ecosystem itself", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_ai_ecosystem", "name": "AI ecosystem", "aliases": [], "description": "The broader ecosystem of AI models, tools, and applications over which NSOs must exercise stewardship.", "grounding_span": "an active stewardship role over the AI ecosystem itself", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_guardrails", "name": "guardrails", "aliases": ["technological guardrails"], "description": "Appropriate controls established for the use of official data and statistics in AI applications.", "grounding_span": "establishing appropriate guardrails for the use of official data and statistics in AI applications", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_licensing_agreements", "name": "licensing agreements", "aliases": [], "description": "Clear agreements governing use and re-use of official data and statistics in AI applications.", "grounding_span": "the provision and enforcement of clear licensing agreements for use and re -use", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_testing_standards", "name": "standards for testing AI-mediated results", "aliases": [], "description": "Standards to be developed for testing the results produced by AI when it mediates official data and statistics.", "grounding_span": "the development of standards for testing AI -mediated results", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_provenance", "name": "provenance", "aliases": [], "description": "Clear indication of the origin of official data and metadata delivered to AI users.", "grounding_span": "with a clear indication of their provenance and vintage", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_vintage", "name": "vintage", "aliases": [], "description": "Clear indication of the temporal version/currency of official data and metadata delivered to AI users.", "grounding_span": "with a clear indication of their provenance and vintage", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_public_good", "name": "public good", "aliases": [], "description": "The status official statistics must secure by embracing both technical and stewardship roles.", "grounding_span": "secure their continuing relevance as a public good", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_policy_decision_making", "name": "policy and decision-making", "aliases": [], "description": "The domain that official statistics are meant to effectively support.", "grounding_span": "effectively support policy and decision -making", "location": "Background and Rationale" },
    { "id": "c_metadata_standards", "name": "metadata standards", "aliases": [], "description": "Standards, alongside APIs and machine-to-machine protocols, that help AI systems access correct data and context.", "grounding_span": "metadata standards, APIs, and emerging machine-to-machine protocols", "location": "Second session (11:30 am – 1:00 pm)" },
    { "id": "c_apis", "name": "APIs", "aliases": [], "description": "Application programming interfaces enabling AI systems to access correct data and necessary context.", "grounding_span": "metadata standards, APIs, and emerging machine-to-machine protocols", "location": "Second session (11:30 am – 1:00 pm)" },

    { "id": "c_machine_understandable", "name": "machine-understandable", "aliases": [], "description": "A property, beyond machine-readability, that data and metadata must have for AI systems.", "grounding_span": "Making data and metadata machine-readable, and machine-understandable", "location": "Second session (11:30 am – 1:00 pm)" },
    { "id": "c_data_governance", "name": "data governance", "aliases": [], "description": "A perspective on AI-readiness focusing on licensing, guardrails, and capacity.", "grounding_span": "This session will discuss AI readiness from a data governance perspective", "location": "Third session (3:00 pm – 4:30 pm)" },
    { "id": "c_data_governance_tools", "name": "data governance tools", "aliases": [], "description": "Tools supporting data governance, named as a topic of the third session.", "grounding_span": "Data governance, data governance tools, and capacity", "location": "Third session (3:00 pm – 4:30 pm)" },
    { "id": "c_capacity", "name": "human and institutional capacity", "aliases": ["capacity"], "description": "Human and organizational capacity needed to strengthen responsible use of AI in official statistics.", "grounding_span": "human and institutional capacity", "location": "Third session (3:00 pm – 4:30 pm)" },
    { "id": "c_ai_agents", "name": "AI agents", "aliases": [], "description": "AI actors accessing and using official data and statistics, whose increased access raises risks and opportunities.", "grounding_span": "increased access to and use of official data and statistics by AI agents", "location": "Opening session (10:00 am – 11:30 am)" },
    { "id": "c_licensing_frameworks", "name": "licensing frameworks", "aliases": ["licensing frameworks and arrangements"], "description": "Frameworks and arrangements for licensing, a governance focus of the third session.", "grounding_span": "licensing frameworks and arrangements", "location": "Third session (3:00 pm – 4:30 pm)" },
